name: enterprise-project-intelligence-os
description: Developer task runner for the Enterprise Project Intelligence OS monorepo. Not an application package.

scripts.local:api-portals:start-all: npm run local:api-services:start-all && npm run local:portals:start-all
scripts.local:api-portals:stop-all: npm run local:portals:stop-all && npm run local:api-services:stop-all
scripts.local:api-portals:status-all: npm run local:api-services:status-all && npm run local:portals:status-all
